reference: These are symptoms of aggressive and antisocial behavior. These are due to genetic and environmental factors. You should go for a chromosomal analysis of your child. An extra X chromosome in the genome may lead to difficulties like these. A frontal lobe lesion in the brain may also cause this, so you should seek help from a pediatric neurologist.
text: These are symptoms of aggressive and antisocial behavior. These are due to genetic and environmental factors. You should go for a chromosomal analysis of your child.
